title: DeltaPrime - Rekt II
relevance_summary: Unchecked input validation flaw exploited via flash loan followed by arbitrary input manipulation

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls arbitrary functions using flash loan funds within the same transaction

red_flags: flash loan followed by arbitrary function calls
funds aggregation and distribution through compromised contracts
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS ARBITRARY_FUNCTIONS USING FLASH_LOAN_FUNDS WITHIN THE SAME TRANSACTION
summary: DeltaPrime suffered a $4.85 million loss due to an unchecked input validation flaw exploited via a flash loan followed by arbitrary function calls. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for flash loans followed by calls to arbitrary functions.
